commits.message: Fix Telegram delivery in Meta ads report (#42)
commits.author: shalomer

panels.title: Fix Telegram delivery in Meta ads report
panels.scene: A distraught villager is tied to a stake. A tiny telegram (a scroll) with the Meta logo is being burned in front of him. Knight calmly extinguishes the flames with a waterskin.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The reports...they said Telegram was failing! I was doomed!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was a reporting error. Telegrams were delivering fine.

panels.title: Fix Telegram delivery in Meta ads report
panels.scene: Villagers are offering golden statues of telegrams to the knight, while others are frantically checking their phones to see if the Telegrams went through.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The Meta overlords lied! Our messages are safe!

panels.title: Fix Telegram delivery in Meta ads report
panels.scene: The town crier is making an announcement on a scroll. He is followed by a parade of villagers overjoyed with telegrams.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Hear Ye! Hear Ye! The Telegrams deliver again! The Knight has saved us!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was a minor issue with how the ad reports were showing.

panels.title: 1 commit. 1 ad report fixed. 0 villagers exploded.
panels.scene: The Knight sits on a crate looking bored, surrounded by grateful villagers building a shrine of telegrams, next to a statue of Mark Zuckerberg, who is crying tears of joy.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall celebrate this day as the Day of the Meta-Gram!
